back_translation: And the LORD said to Aaron: 'You and your sons and your father's house with you shall bear the iniquity of the sanctuary; and you and your sons with you shall bear the iniquity of your priesthood.

And also your brothers, the tribe of Levi, the tribe of your father, bring near with you, that they may join with you and minister to you, while you and your sons with you are before the Tent of the Testimony.
And they shall keep your duty and the duty of all the Tent; but to the holy vessels and to the altar they shall not approach, lest they die — both they and you also.
And they shall be joined with you and shall keep the duty of the Tent of Meeting, for all the service of the Tent; and a stranger shall not come near to you.
And you shall keep the duty of the sanctuary and the duty of the altar, so that there shall not be wrath again upon the sons of Israel.
And I, behold, I have taken your brothers the Levites from the midst of the sons of Israel; to you they are given as a gift, dedicated to the LORD, to do the service of the Tent of Meeting.

And you and your sons with you shall guard your priesthood for everything concerning the altar and for what is inside the veil; and you shall serve. As a service of a gift I give your priesthood; and the outsider who comes near shall be put to death.'

And the LORD spoke to Aaron: 'And I, behold, I have given to you the charge of My offerings, of all the holy things of the sons of Israel; to you I have given them as a portion (anointed portion), and to your sons as a permanent statute.'

This shall be yours from the most holy things, from the fire — all their offerings, of every grain offering, every sin offering, every guilt offering which they render to Me — it is most holy to you and to your sons.
In the most holy place you shall eat it; every male shall eat it; it shall be holy to you.

And this is yours: the contribution of their gifts, of all the wave offerings of the sons of Israel; to you I have given them and to your sons and to your daughters with you, as a permanent statute. Every clean person in your house may eat it.
All the best of the olive oil, and all the best of the new wine and grain — their firstfruits which they give to the LORD — to you I have given them.
The firstfruits of everything that is in their land, which they bring to the LORD, shall be yours. Every clean person in your house may eat it.
Every devoted thing in Israel shall be yours.

Every firstborn of the womb, of all flesh, which they bring to the LORD, of man or of beast, shall be yours. However, you shall surely redeem the firstborn of man, and the firstborn of an unclean animal you shall redeem.
And those to be redeemed of him, from a month old you shall redeem, by your valuation, five silver shekels, by the sanctuary shekel — twenty gerahs it is.

But the firstborn of an ox, or the firstborn of a sheep, or the firstborn of a goat — you shall not redeem; they are holy. Their blood you shall splash on the altar, and their fat you shall burn — a fire offering, for a pleasing aroma to the LORD.
And their meat shall be yours; like the breast of the wave offering and like the right thigh, it shall be yours.

All the contributions of the holy things which the sons of Israel lift up to the LORD, I have given to you and to your sons and to your daughters with you, as a permanent statute. It is a permanent covenant of salt before the LORD, for you and for your offspring with you.
And the LORD said to Aaron: 'In their land you shall not inherit, and a portion shall not be yours among them. I am your portion and your inheritance, in the midst of the sons of Israel.'
'And to the sons of Levi, behold, I have given all the tithe in Israel as an inheritance, in exchange for their service which they are doing — the service of the Tent of Meeting.'
'And the sons of Israel shall not approach again to the Tent of Meeting, to bear sin, to die.'

'And the Levite, he shall do the service of the Tent of Meeting, and they shall bear their iniquity. A permanent statute for your generations, and in the midst of the sons of Israel they shall not inherit an inheritance.'

'For the tithe of the sons of Israel which they lift up to the LORD as a contribution, I have given to the Levites as an inheritance. Therefore I have said to them: in the midst of the sons of Israel they shall not inherit an inheritance.'
And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:

'And to the Levites you shall speak and say to them: When you receive from the sons of Israel the tithe which I have given to you from them as your inheritance, you shall lift up from it a contribution to the LORD — a tithe from the tithe.'
'And your contribution shall be reckoned to you like the grain from the threshing floor and like the fullness from the winepress.'
'So you also shall lift up a contribution to the LORD from all your tithes which you receive from the sons of Israel; and you shall give from it the contribution of the LORD to Aaron the priest.'
'From all your gifts you shall lift up all the contribution of the LORD, from all its best, its consecrated portion from it.'
'And you shall say to them: When you lift up its best from it, it shall be reckoned to the Levites as the produce of the threshing floor and as the produce of the winepress.'
'And you shall eat it in every place, you and your household; for it is a wage to you in exchange for your service in the Tent of Meeting.'
'And you shall not bear sin because of it, in your lifting up its best from it; and the holy things of the sons of Israel you shall not defile, and you shall not die.'
